title: Italian Wrap
description: A kid-friendly, irish-approved Italian-inspired dish wrapped in a friendly floral dish wrap.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the Italian sausage and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until no longer pink, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the garlic, Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chopped basil and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Warm the floral dish wraps in the microwave or in a dry skillet.
Assemble the wraps by spooning the sausage mixture onto the center of each wrap, followed by some shredded provolone cheese.
Fold the bottom edge of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap into a tight cylinder.
